(embedded source map)\n```\nThis is a typical pattern for an index or barrel module, often used to aggregate exports for easier imports elsewhere. The embedded source map is base64-encoded JSON, used for debugging.\n\n---\n\n### 1. Confirm if issues are present in the code\n- The code is straightforward, with no dynamic code, user input, or external data handling.\n- The source map is embedded as a data URI, which is common in bundled/minified code.\n- No signs of code injection, obfuscation, or malicious code.\n\n**Conclusion:**  \n**No security issues or malicious code are present.** The code appears benign.\n\n---\n\n### 2.
